prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: FLL-34MMPPALAFS-34MM-BLCK Product Type: AIMING_SCOPE_SIGHT Brand (from catalog): Flatline-Ops Existing Title: Flatline-Ops Patriot Plus Accu Level Fixed Adjustable Gun Scope 34mm, Black, FL34PP21 Description: LEVEL WHATEVER FIELD YOU'RE PLAYING ON.

The newest member of the ACCU/LEVEL platoon, the Patriot Plus installs quickly and effortlessly with easy micro-level adjustments after installation. The Patriot Plus 34mm is a rigid, ultra-rugged level that sits higher and wider for more visibility and fast referencing. Our ACCU/LEVEL system aids in the correction of "cant error," giving you dead-on true vertical hold to make sure you are on target.

WHATS NEW FOR THE PATRIOT PLUS?

We have redesigned the Patriot Plus for a more complete shooting experience. With the new addition of the Dovetail Accessory Lug, you can now add a STRONG ARM and ADI/ACI to the Patriot ACCU/LEVEL system.

SOLID, DURABLE CONSTRUCTION
Each level is machined from advanced 6061-T6 aircraft aluminum and black hard anodized to protect it from the extremes of the outdoors. The level is also built to fit right- or left-handed shooters.

HIGH VISIBILITY

High-visibility fluorescent fluid level is easy to visualize and locate before each shot. You also have the ability to do +/- micro adjustments to the level after installation with the fine adjustment screws. Search Terms: anti cant 34mm scope level 34 mm bubble level for rifle scope tube long range shooting competition precision shooting optics accessory hunting accessories Features: - Fit Size: 34mm - Width: 0.5" - EFFORTLESS EASE OF USE: Rifle scope mount articulate in two positions for optimal line of sight while using high visibility fluorescent fluid - Finish: Black Hard Anodized - Hardware: Stainless Steel === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
